ddls:
CREATE TABLE "molecules" (
  "mol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each molecular entry */,
  "cut" TEXT /* Classification of the cut (e.g., single) */,
  "context" TEXT /* Chemical context of the molecule */,
  "frag_l" TEXT /* Left fragment identifier */,
  "frag_r" TEXT /* Right fragment identifier */,
  "structural_formula" TEXT /* Detailed structural formula of the molecule */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "smiles" TEXT /* SMILES representation of the molecule */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the molecule (e.g., internal synthesis, external supplier) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the molecule was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the molecule data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction record */,
  "molid_l" INTEGER /* Left molecular identifier in the interaction */,
  "molid_r" INTEGER /* Right molecular identifier in the interaction */,
  "hERG_pIC50_diff" REAL /* Difference in hERG pIC50 values */,
  "attchpt_ctx_l" TEXT /* Attachment point context for left molecule */,
  "attchpt_frag_l" TEXT /* Attachment point fragment for left molecule */,
  "attchpt_ctx_r" TEXT /* Attachment point context for right molecule */,
  "attchpt_frag_r" TEXT /* Attachment point fragment for right molecule */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., agonist, antagonist) */,
  "efficacy_score" REAL /* Numerical score representing the efficacy of the interaction */,
  "toxicity_level" TEXT /* Toxicity level if available */,
  "reference" TEXT /* References to literature or studies supporting the interaction data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_molid_r FOREIGN KEY ("molid_r") REFERENCES molecules ("mol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_molid_l FOREIGN KEY ("molid_l") REFERENCES molecules ("mol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental result */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interaction being studied */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date of the experiment */,
  "observations" TEXT /* General observations or outcomes from the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "pIC50_value" REAL /* Actual pIC50 value measured in the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., in vitro, in vivo) */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the results (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_results_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)
